info.title: Workhorse API
info.description: Local-first runtime API for the Workhorse multi-workspace kanban.

post.summary: Register a workspace
Open a local folder picker for a workspace root

200.description: Selected workspace root path, or null when canceled

501.description: Folder picker is unavailable on this platform

get.summary: List Git refs for a workspace
Get Git sync status for a workspace

post.summary: Pull latest changes from origin for a workspace
Create a task card
Approve a review-ready subtask
Reject a review-ready subtask
Retry a review-ready subtask
Cleanup a task worktree
Start task execution
Stop task execution
Send a user message to the task's Codex session
Create a task plan and move it to todo
Send feedback to refine a task plan via session resume
Request a Claude review for a task in review

get.summary: Get the file diff for a task worktree

post.summary: Manually trigger scheduler evaluation
Create a new account-level agent

get.summary: List agents mounted to a workspace

post.summary: Mount an agent to a workspace

delete.summary: Unmount an agent from a workspace

patch.summary: Update the role of a workspace-mounted agent

post.summary: Create a thread in a workspace

schema.description: Message id cursor — return messages created strictly after this one.

post.summary: Append a chat message to a thread
Restart a coordinator thread using the workspace coordinator

409.description: Coordinator is not configured for the workspace

post.summary: Approve a plan and materialize its subtasks
Reject a plan

PartialRecordRunnerTypenumber.description: Make all properties in T optional

prStrategy.description: PR creation strategy for workspace-level agent coordination.

autoApproveSubtasks.description: When true, succeeded subtasks skip manual human approval.

dependencies.description: Task IDs that must be "done" before this task can start

rejected.description: Human reviewers explicitly rejected this subtask.

cancelledAt.description: Present when a team subtask was explicitly cancelled by a user.

taskKind.description: Internal visibility bucket for UI-facing tasks. Defaults to `user`.

parentTaskId.description: When set, this task is a subtask created via an approved Plan.

source.description:
Agent-driven board: provenance of this task.
`user`        — hand-created from the kanban UI (default when missing).
`agent_plan`  — materialized by approving a Plan.
Optional on the TS side so legacy call sites that construct Task literals
keep compiling; the DB layer always populates it (default 'user').

planId.description: Present when `source === "agent_plan"`; points at the originating Plan.

assigneeAgentId.description: The WorkspaceAgent that should pick up this task (may be decided later).

Recordstringstring.description: Construct a type with a set of properties K of type T

PickAppStateschemaVersion.description: From T, pick a set of properties whose keys are in the union K

AccountAgent.description:
An account-level agent definition. Agents are created once and can be
mounted to multiple workspaces with different roles.

WorkspaceAgent.description:
An AccountAgent with the role it was assigned when mounted to a workspace.
Returned by listWorkspaceAgents().

taskId.description: Set when `kind === "task"` — the task this thread belongs to.

coordinatorAgentId.description: The WorkspaceAgent that drives this thread (if any).

payload.description: Payload shape is narrowed per `kind` by typia validators.

consumedByRunId.description: When set, this message was consumed by the given coordinator run turn.

dependsOn.description: References to other drafts' titles within the same plan.

kind.description: Defaults to "chat" when omitted. Server may reject other kinds for human senders.

after.description: Message id cursor — return messages created strictly after this one.
